privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on synthetically generated data via setup_task.sh. The expected files ('SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt', 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv', 'backup_authorized_keys', 'data_manifest.sha256') are explicitly generated. The verifier (via export_result.sh) correctly checks the password 'SecureEncrypt2024!', the volume path '/home/ga/Volumes/sensitive_encrypted.hc', the source directory '/home/ga/SensitiveData', and the report filename 'transfer_report.txt'. All metadata claims perfectly match the task instructions, setup generation, and evaluation scripts.
